name: Huboo
description: Huboo fulfillment API for small-batch ecommerce operations. Create warehouse products, announce inbound stock, read inventory, create outbound orders, cancel orders, and fetch tracking.

tools.name: products_list
tools.description: List products on the Huboo account. Filter by client SKUs when reconciling Apteva Catalog SKUs with Huboo P-numbers.

client_skus.description: Comma-separated client SKUs to filter by. Enclose SKUs containing commas in backticks.

tools.name: products_create
tools.description: Create one or more Huboo products. Use before sending Alibaba stock into Huboo so products have Huboo SKUs/P-numbers.

data.description: Array of Huboo product objects. Common fields: client_sku, identifier, title, image_url, weight, customs, variations, prices.

tools.name: inventory_get
tools.description: Get Huboo inventory quantities for products or bundles. Returns total available and allocated quantities.

skus.description: Comma-separated Huboo P-numbers without the P prefix. Maximum 50.

return_negative_quantities.description: Return negative quantities when Huboo reports an inventory deficit.

tools.name: batches_list
tools.description: List Huboo batch details for stock that uses batch or expiry tracking.

bbe_after.description: Return batches with best-before-expiry after this date, for example 2026-01-30Z.

bbe_before.description: Return batches with best-before-expiry before this date, for example 2026-07-12Z.

tools.name: asns_create
tools.description: Create an advance shipping notice for inbound stock being sent to Huboo, for example an Alibaba MOQ shipment.

data.description: Huboo ASN object. Common fields: estimated_date, reference_number, tracking_number, delivery_details, items.

tools.name: delivery_receipts_list
tools.description: List delivery receipts for shipments Huboo has received. Use to confirm inbound Alibaba stock arrived and was processed.

tools.name: orders_create
tools.description: Create one or more outbound Huboo orders. Use when a Shopify, Amazon, Kaufland, or direct-store order should be fulfilled from Huboo stock.

data.description: Array of Huboo order objects. Common fields: client_order_id, lines, address, order_options.

tools.name: orders_list
tools.description: List Huboo orders by Huboo order IDs, client order IDs, status, or creation date range.

order_ids.description: Comma-separated Huboo order IDs. Cannot be used with client_order_ids.

client_order_ids.description: Comma-separated client order IDs. Cannot be used with order_ids.

created_before.description: Only orders created before this ISO timestamp.

created_after.description: Only orders created after this ISO timestamp.

tools.name: order_cancel
tools.description: Cancel a Huboo order if it has not been locked for shipping.

tools.name: order_tracking_get
tools.description: Get Huboo tracking information for an order, grouped by tracking number and dispatched order lines.
